title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at DLF

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at DLF
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
